jobs.purpose: Nightly at 03:00 tenant-local time: for each Session past ends_at on that day, sweep expected attendees → create AbsenceRecord (status='unexcused', reported_at=now(), reported_by_user_id=NULL, counted_toward_freeze=true) for every enrolled athlete without an AttendanceRecord or existing AbsenceRecord. Fires AttendanceReconciled per session.
steps: SELECT id, tenant_id, team_id, season_id, ends_at FROM sessions WHERE ends_at BETWEEN now() - interval '25 hours' AND now() AND status IN ('completed', 'in_progress') AND deleted_at IS NULL

For each session, resolve expected attendees: SELECT athlete_id, id AS enrollment_id FROM athlete_enrollments WHERE tenant_id=? AND team_id=? AND season_id=? AND status IN ('active', 'confirmed') AND deleted_at IS NULL
For each expected athlete: SELECT id FROM attendance_records WHERE session_id=? AND athlete_id=? AND deleted_at IS NULL; if found → skip (attended)
ELSE SELECT id FROM absence_records WHERE session_id=? AND athlete_id=? AND deleted_at IS NULL; if found → skip (already reported)
ELSE INSERT AbsenceRecord (status='unexcused', reported_at=now(), reported_by_user_id=NULL, counted_toward_freeze=true) → fires AbsenceRecorded (which cascades threshold evaluation)
Emit AttendanceReconciled with counts (expected / present / late / absent / excused)

jobs.purpose: Per-absence: cascade notifications based on policy.notification_config. Dispatches FirstAbsenceNotification / ThirdAbsenceWarningNotification / AbsenceFreezeThresholdReachedNotification per athlete's rolling-window absence count.
steps: Given an AbsenceRecord id: load absence + resolve applicable AttendancePolicy

Compute rolling-window unexcused count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM absence_records WHERE athlete_id=? AND status='unexcused' AND counted_toward_freeze=true AND reported_at > now() - policy.absence_freeze_period_days days AND deleted_at IS NULL
If count == 1 AND policy.notification_config.notify_athlete_on_first_absence: dispatch FirstAbsenceNotification (to athlete + primary guardian)
If count == 2 AND policy.notification_config.notify_guardian_on_second: dispatch to primary guardian
If count == 3 AND policy.notification_config.notify_admin_on_third: dispatch ThirdAbsenceWarningNotification (to admin + safeguarding_officer)
If count >= policy.max_unexcused_absences_per_period: dispatch AbsenceFreezeThresholdReachedNotification (cannot-opt-out) — this fires alongside the CheckAbsenceFreezeThresholdJob's freeze cascade

jobs.purpose: Per-athlete rolling-window check. Fires AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached (P1) when unexcused-absence count crosses policy.max_unexcused_absences_per_period. Dispatched from AbsenceRecordObserver.creating + on excusal reversals.
steps: Given an athlete_id + optional policy_id: resolve applicable policy for the athlete's active enrollment

Compute count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM absence_records WHERE athlete_id=? AND status='unexcused' AND counted_toward_freeze=true AND reported_at > now() - policy.absence_freeze_period_days days AND deleted_at IS NULL

If count >= policy.max_unexcused_absences_per_period AND NOT already at freeze state: fire AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached with (athlete_id, membership_id, policy_id, unexcused_count, threshold, window_days) → FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached hook pauses the membership via membership::MembershipObserver.setStatus('paused')

If count < threshold AND athlete's membership currently paused with pause_reason='attendance_threshold': fire potential unfreeze event; admin manually resumes via membership:resume (auto-unfreeze intentionally NOT implemented — admin must review pattern first)

jobs.purpose: Per-absence: dispatch invoice creation via finance::invoice for a policy-configured no-show fee. Only runs for tenants holding `attendance_no_show_fees` entitlement. Idempotent — refuses to fire twice for the same absence_record_id.
steps: Given an absence_record_id: load absence + resolve policy
Refuse if tenant lacks `attendance_no_show_fees` entitlement
Refuse if policy.no_show_fee_cents == 0 or NULL
Refuse if absence.status != 'unexcused'
Refuse if invoice already dispatched for this absence (check absence.metadata.no_show_fee_invoice_id)

Dispatch finance::invoice::CreateNoShowFeeInvoiceAction with (athlete_id, membership_id, fee_amount_cents=policy.no_show_fee_cents, fee_currency=policy.no_show_fee_currency, description='No-show fee for session ' + session_id)
On success: set absence.metadata.no_show_fee_invoice_id + fire NoShowFeeCharged
On failure: retry with exponential backoff; after 3 attempts fire NoShowFeeChargeFailed diagnostic event

jobs.purpose: Fallback path for the AttendanceOrchestrator when synchronous atomic consumption isn't available (rare — high-latency environments during peak check-in windows). Runs the pass consumption in a queued transaction with retries. Every failure is a P1 signal (attendance without pass consumption is a compliance violation).
steps: Given (attendance_record_id, target_pass_id): open DB transaction
SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the pass WHERE id=target_pass_id AND consumed_at IS NULL
UPDATE passes SET consumed_at, consumed_by_session_id
UPDATE attendance_records SET consumed_pass_id=target_pass_id, membership_id=target_pass.membership_id
Fire PassConsumedViaAttendance
On failure: rollback + fire PassConsumeAtomicityFailed (P1) — orphan-checkins job will pick up the drift

jobs.purpose: Nightly: verify integrity of atomic pass consumption. Every attendance with session.requires_pass=true MUST have consumed_pass_id set; every pass with consumed_by_session_id set MUST have a matching attendance record. Findings are P1 compliance signals.
steps: SELECT id FROM attendance_records ar JOIN sessions s ON s.id=ar.session_id WHERE s.requires_pass=true AND ar.consumed_pass_id IS NULL AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.created_at > now() - interval '48 hours' — Orphan attendance without pass
For each: fire diagnostic event OrphanAttendanceWithoutPass + emit metric academorix.attendance.orphan.without_pass

SELECT id FROM passes p WHERE p.consumed_by_session_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM attendance_records ar WHERE ar.consumed_pass_id=p.id AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL) AND p.consumed_at > now() - interval '48 hours' — Orphan pass consumption without attendance
For each: fire OrphanPassConsumption + emit metric academorix.attendance.orphan.pass_consumption

SELECT ar.id FROM attendance_records ar WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM absence_records abs WHERE abs.session_id=ar.session_id AND abs.athlete_id=ar.athlete_id AND abs.deleted_at IS NULL) AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL — Mutual exclusion violation
For each: fire AttendanceAbsenceCoexist (P1)

jobs.purpose: Weekly per-branch attendance summary: rate, absence patterns, late-arrival trends. Feeds the admin dashboard's Weekly Attendance Digest. Only runs for tenants holding `attendance_analytics` entitlement.
steps: Refuse if tenant lacks `attendance_analytics` entitlement
For each branch: aggregate last 7 days of attendance records + absences + late arrivals
Compute: attendance_rate = present + late / expected; late_rate = late / (present + late); absence_rate = unexcused / expected
Persist to attendance_reports table (materialised view) with (tenant_id, branch_id, period_start, period_end, metrics_json)
Dispatch WeeklyAttendanceDigestNotification to admin + branch_manager (opt-in)
